text:
BRIGHTWAVE CREATIVE CO.
Proposal for Nutriva Foods — 'MorningStars' Launch

Dear Priya and team,

Thank you for inviting Brightwave to respond. We are a creative-led shop and we fell in love with MorningStars the moment we read the brief. Cereal is not just breakfast — it's the first happy ritual of a child's morning, and that is the territory we want to own for you.

OUR BIG IDEA: "Mornings Made of Stars"
A platform built around the small moments of wonder that start a child's day. We see a hero film that feels cinematic but intimate, a key visual that turns the cereal bowl into a tiny galaxy, and a messaging framework that speaks to parents about nourishment and to kids about delight. This is the kind of idea that earns a place at award shows AND on the breakfast table.

WHAT WE'LL DELIVER
Strategy & creative development — the full platform, positioning, key visual and messaging matrix. This is our heartland and where most of our senior team's time goes.
TVC development — three script routes, storyboards, and a director's treatment from one of our regular collaborators.
TVC production — we will produce the hero 30s and the two 10s cutdowns end to end, with a director and production partner we trust completely. Child artists will be cast with care.
Social organic content — a beautiful always-on content world for the first three months.
Launch program management — we'll hold the whole thing together with a dedicated producer.

We believe deeply in craft, so we've chosen to present this as an integrated partnership rather than nickel-and-diming every line. Our all-in fee for the above is ₹2.4 Cr. We find that clients who work with us on a partnership basis get the best of our people. For clarity, that ₹240L covers strategy, development, production, organic social and program management as one connected piece of work.

We think paid media planning and buying is better handled by a specialist and would be happy to recommend partners, though we can fold light coordination into our program management.

TIMELINE
We'd want roughly one quarter from appointment to air, give or take depending on shoot windows and approvals. Good work shouldn't be rushed, and a launch this important deserves room to breathe.

A few assumptions: we assume Nutriva provides brand guidelines and product samples, and that approvals come through a single empowered client lead. We assume two rounds of revisions per deliverable, consistent with your RFQ.

We're genuinely excited about this one. As a final note — to deliver this at the standard MorningStars deserves, we'd put our most senior creative director on it, and our honest all-in number lands closer to ₹2.6 Cr once we account for the calibre of production we have in mind. We'd love to talk it through.

Warmly,
The Brightwave Team

MEDIAMETRIC PARTNERS — RESPONSE TO RFQ-2026-MKT-014
Prepared for: Nutriva Foods India Pvt. Ltd.

1. ABOUT US
MediaMetric is a performance and data-driven media agency. We have run paid acquisition for 14 FMCG brands in India over the last three years, including two food launches. Our edge is measurable media — we plan, buy, and optimise with rigour.

2. SCOPE & PRICING
We have priced the line items where we are strongest. Rate card below.

| Line item | Scope | Price |
| Strategy & creative development | Comms strategy + creative platform | USD 28,000 |
| TVC development | Scripts, storyboards, treatment | USD 18,000 |
| Social organic content (3 mo) | Calendar + monthly asset packs + community mgmt | USD 9,000 / month |
| Social paid media planning | Full media plan, targeting, forecast | USD 12,000 |
| Social paid media buying & optimization | Execution + weekly optimisation + reporting | 12% of media spend |
| Kids advertising & claims compliance review | Independent ASCI review + documented sign-off | USD 6,500 |
| Launch program management | PMO across workstreams | USD 7,500 / month |

Note: media management is charged at 12% of working media. The client sets the media budget separately; our management fee scales with it.

3. COMPLIANCE (KIDS / CLAIMS)
We take ASCI compliance seriously. Every asset directed at children is reviewed against the ASCI Guidelines for Advertising to Children before release, and all nutrition claims are checked for substantiation with documented evidence held on file. We provide a per-asset compliance log and a final sign-off memo. We have an in-house standards lead who owns this.

4. ASSUMPTIONS
We assume the client provides all brand assets, product information, and creative approvals within 48 hours of request to maintain the optimisation cadence. Delays beyond 48h may affect performance commitments.

5. COMMERCIALS SUMMARY
Indicative total of fixed-fee components is approximately ₹62,00,000 excluding the percentage-based media management and excluding media spend itself. GST extra at applicable rates.

6. WHAT WE DON'T DO
We are not a production house. We have deliberately not quoted TVC production — we'd recommend partnering us with a production specialist, and we're glad to manage the media and performance side.

We look forward to discussing.
MediaMetric Partners

Launchpad Integrated
Full-Service. Full-Throttle. Full Stop.

Hi Nutriva team!! 🚀

We're SO excited about MorningStars. Launchpad is a true full-service partner — strategy, creative, production, social, media, the works. One team, one invoice, zero headaches. Let's make some magic.

HERE'S HOW WE'LL CRUSH IT:

✦ Strategy & creative — we'll craft a launch platform that pops. Big idea, key visual, messaging, all of it.
✦ TVC development & production — scripts through to finished films, hero + cutdowns. We've got an amazing production network.
✦ Social organic — we'll handle social, don't worry, we live and breathe content. Calendars, assets, community, sorted.
✦ Paid media planning + buying — we'll plan it and run it. Our media team is sharp.
✦ Compliance — we'll make sure everything's above board for kids advertising.
✦ Program management — one PM to rule them all.

PERFORMANCE PROMISE: We guarantee 10M+ organic reach in the first three months. We're that confident.

NUMBERS
We like to keep things flexible, so we'll provide a final quote upon scope confirmation once we've aligned on exact deliverables. To give you a feel: strategy + creative is around ₹35 lakh, the TVC piece (dev + production) lands in the ₹90 lakh–₹1.1 Cr range depending on shoot scale, and social organic runs about ₹6 lakh/month. Media planning is ₹8 lakh. Program management is included in our overall fee.

Payment: we work on 50/30/20 — 50% on award, 30% at mid-point, 20% on delivery.

TIMELINE (we're proud of this one):
Week 0 — Award & kickoff
Weeks 1–3 — Strategy & creative platform
Weeks 3–5 — TVC development & approvals
Weeks 5–9 — TVC production & post
Week 6 — Social & media plan live in market (organic), paid from Week 8
Week 10 — Full campaign live, launch event
Week 12 — First optimisation & performance review

FINE PRINT: Pricing excludes media spend, third-party licensing (music, stock, fonts) and talent/usage fees, which are billed at cost.

Let's gooo!
— Team Launchpad
